name: Salmon-Asparagus Manicotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the manicotti according to package directions, drain and cool. Set aside.
2. Poach the salmon steak in broth or desired liquid, let it cool, then remove skin and bones. Crumble the flesh into medium-small pieces.
3. Trim the bottoms of the asparagus and chop the green parts into 1/2" pieces. (No need to cook them beforehand.)
4. In a large bowl, combine the cheese, salmon flakes, asparagus, salt, and pepper to taste.
5. Mix the cream of asparagus soup with 1 can of milk until smooth. Add some of this mixture to the cheese mixture; it should be soft but not runny.
6. Stuff each manicotti tube with the prepared filling.
7. Place the stuffed manicotti side-by-side in a shallow baking dish. Pour any remaining soup over the top and sprinkle Parmesan cheese on top.
8. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes or until heated through. Serve with steamed asparagus.
